episodes.name: eps1.0_hellofriend.mov
episodes.overview: Elliot, a cyber-security engineer by day and vigilante hacker by night, is recruited by a mysterious underground group to destroy the firm he's paid to protect. Elliot must decide how far he'll go to expose the forces he believes are running (and ruining) the world.

episodes.name: eps1.1_ones-and-zer0es.mpeg
episodes.overview: Elliot is torn between accepting a job offer from Evil Corp and joining the fsociety hacker group. At the same time Elliot needs to make decision that could harm people around him.

episodes.name: eps1.2_d3bug.mkv
episodes.overview: Elliot tries to lead a normal life, but can't escape fsociety. Gideon, meanwhile, grows suspicious, and Tyrell plays dirty.

episodes.name: eps1.3_da3m0ns.mp4
episodes.overview: Elliot's inner-demons threaten an fsociety operation.

episodes.name: eps1.4_3xpl0its.wmv
episodes.overview: Fsociety attempts to penetrate Steel Mountain, the most secure data facility in America.

episodes.name: eps1.5_br4ve-trave1er.asf
episodes.overview: Elliot attempts to hack Vera out of jail in order to save someone he cares about. Meanwhile, Tyrell's "game" gets crazy and Angela digs deeper into her mother's death.

episodes.name: eps1.6_v1ew-s0urce.flv
episodes.overview: Elliott goes missing. Mr. Robot tries to pull fsociety back together. Angela goes head-to-head with an old nemesis.

episodes.name: eps1.7_wh1ter0se.m4v
episodes.overview: Allsafe is controlled, the Dark Army is ready to meet Elliot & Tyrell and Joanna's plan goes into effect.

episodes.name: eps1.8_m1rr0r1ng.qt
episodes.overview: The Evil Corp hack is threatened by a mystery man from Elliot's past.

episodes.name: eps1.9_zer0-day.avi
episodes.overview: Mr. Robot and Tyrell are MIA and a past hack haunts Elliot.

name: season_1.0
overview: Elliot finds himself at a crossroad when the mysterious leader of an underground hacker group recruits him to destroy the firm he is paid to protect. Compelled by his personal beliefs, Elliot struggles to resist the chance to take down the multinational CEOs he believes are running (and ruining) the world.
